name: AI Fluency (Practical Use in Workflow)
description: Ability to effectively leverage AI tools to improve speed, quality, and clarity across core tasks; includes prompt design, tool selection, and judgment about when not to use AI.

levels.label: Emerging
behavioral_indicators: Generic or templated outputs without adaptation
Resume or artifacts show unedited AI artifacts (formatting tells, boilerplate)
Cannot explain prompt choices or tool trade-offs

levels.label: Solid
behavioral_indicators: Uses AI for drafting or research with basic editing
Some prompt clarity; inconsistent outcome quality
Occasional misapplication (uses AI where manual would be faster)

levels.label: Strong
behavioral_indicators: Demonstrates before/after improvement using AI in real work
Explains prompt strategies and guardrails (hallucination checks, citations)
Integrates AI into workflow to increase throughput without quality loss

levels.label: Exceptional
behavioral_indicators: Builds small internal tooling or repeatable patterns (macros, templates, scripts)
Shows domain-aware prompt engineering (style transfer, constraints, evals)
Clear judgment on when to avoid AI; produces audit-ready outputs
